implemented_slice_constraints.case_revision_assembly: complete canonical Case create and commit_revision
implemented_slice_constraints.case_discovery: exact ID/namespace alias resolve, cohesive historical read, bounded scan lexical search and explicit-link traversal
implemented_slice_constraints.case_lifecycle_portability: ordinary tombstone stage/commit, staged-only purge inspection, immutable audience-aware owner fragments and deterministic Markdown reconciliation proposals
implemented_slice_constraints.frame_revision_assembly: complete canonical Frame/Discovery create and commit_revision
implemented_slice_constraints.frame_query: exact receipt/resolve/current/history/discovery reads, active-only/all-selected Discovery projection, and selector-bound fenced paging
implemented_slice_constraints.common_subset: typed resolve/list/bounded lexical search over case/frame normalized records
implemented_slice_constraints.markdown_profile: synthetic interchange only; full file-authoritative operation remains L-05
implemented_slice_constraints.exact_identity: UUID-based Case frontmatter plus authority-marker-bound digest-verified manifests; typed stable Frame, Discovery, and version IDs with exact one-to-one digest-verified manifest bindings
implemented_slice_constraints.frame_authority_scope: one-or-more granted namespaces including active home grant; hidden namespace IDs recursively masked
implemented_slice_constraints.legacy_reconciliation: immutable non-mutating preparation only; no writeback, rename, watcher, or view lifecycle creation
